text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text:
(...I also got her a present, but giving it to her
might just bring her misfortune. So I think... I'll
stick to a simple birthday wish...)

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text:
Wow! Hooray, yippee! ♪ Rice wished me a happy
birthday!

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text:
I'm suuuper-duper happy you remembered, Rice! I
wanna hear you say it again! ♪

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text:
Thanks, Rice! Say it again! I wanna hear you say it
one more time!

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text:
H-happy birthday! ...U-uuh, this is a little
embarrassing...

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text:
(Urara's so happy... Meanwhile, I'm here feeling
all afraid... Be brave, Rice... and give her the
present!)

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text:
Um... Instead of saying it again, what if I handed
you my present... Is that okay?

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text:
Whaaat?! You have a present for me?!
Yippity-yay! What is it, what is it?

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text:
But you know, I still wanna hear you wish me a
happy birthday a few more times. ♪ Again, again!
Say it again!

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text:
Urara... Hehe, sure thing. I'll keep saying it until
you're happy!
